data.name: Hentai Clicker: Celestia is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Celestia is streaming

Step into a glittering palace where elegance meets temptation.
Celestia, a mischievous princess with a radiant smile, is live—and she loves being admired. Every click captures her attention, strengthens her royal aura, and reveals a more daring side hidden beneath her refined manners.

Graceful, playful, and delightfully teasing, Celestia invites you behind silk curtains and golden halls to discover her sweetest—and naughtiest—secrets. 👑✨

💎 About the Game

Hentai Clicker: Celestia is streaming combines addictive clicker gameplay with a charming royal fantasy.
Each tap increases Celestia’s brilliance, unlocking elegant outfits, refined animations, and clever reactions that make the experience shine.

Collect hearts to explore her luxurious world, unlock new milestones, and let the magic of a fairy tale turn delightfully mischievous.

🎉 Features

👑 Royal Atmosphere – A bright, luxurious palace setting full of charm.
✨ Naughty Princess – Elegant, playful, and irresistibly tempting.
🖱️ Addictive Clicker Gameplay – Easy to play, hard to stop.
💗 Unlockable Outfits – From majestic gowns to bold royal looks.
🔊 Voice & Reactions – Soft whispers, playful laughs, and teasing responses.
🚀 Progression System – Stack hearts and reveal new sides of Celestia.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

If you enjoy fairy-tale aesthetics, elegance, and a touch of playful mischief, Celestia is the perfect fantasy.
She doesn’t command—she enchants. And every click pulls you deeper into her royal world. ✨

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – Each tap draws the princess closer.
🔓 Unlock Outfits & Scenes – Spend hearts to reveal new moments.
💥 Upgrade Skills – Boost progression and intensify the experience.

🎉 Enter the Royal Fantasy

She’s live.
She’s watching.
And she loves the attention.

Jump into Hentai Clicker: Celestia is streaming and let this naughty princess steal your heart. 👑✨

data.short_description: 👑 Enter a royal fantasy in Hentai Clicker: Celestia is streaming ✨ Click to collect ❤️, unlock elegant royal outfits, and enjoy a playful, addictive clicker experience with a mischievous princess who loves to be admired.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 韓文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 4000
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon R9 M370X
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
